scripts.build: git clone https://github.com/flutter/flutter.git -b stable --depth 1 $HOME/flutter && export PATH="$HOME/flutter/bin:$PATH" && flutter config --enable-web && flutter pub get && flutter build web --release --dart-define=SUPABASE_URL=$SUPABASE_URL --dart-define=SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=$SUPABASE_ANON_KEY
